## TOP 5 Unimplemented Improvements

| # | Candidate | One-sentence description | Complexity | Fork from |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **LEVEL_SWEEP_SNIPE_WATCHER** | Watch for single-bar wicks through pre-identified key levels with ≥3× avg volume that close back through the level — the liquidity-grab pattern J called out on 5/11 | M | `sniper_watcher` (shares level-lookup logic) |
| 2 | **TRENDLINE_BREAK_VOLUME_WATCHER** | Monitor ascending/descending trendlines with ≥3 touches; fire when price closes through on volume ≥2× avg (per J's 5/11 12:40 call) | M | `vwap_watcher` (shares trend-detection logic) |
| 3 | **RIBBON_SPREAD_WATCHER** | Track EMA ribbon spread (Fast-to-Slow); fire when spread <30c indicating chop (playbook context filter L63, not actively watched) | S | `bullish_watcher` (already computes ribbon) |
| 4 | **VOLUME_DIVERGENCE_WATCHER** | Flag breakdown/reclaim bars followed within 1-2 bars by opposite-direction volume ≥1.3× avg (playbook context filter, not monitored) | S | `orb_watcher` (shares volume computation) |
| 5 | **STAIRSTEP_CONTINUATION_WATCHER** | Track bounce_history at broken levels; fire when 3+ strictly monotonic highs (or lows) form a sequence (playbook candidate, not in fleet) | M | `sniper_watcher` (shares level-history tracking) |

---

## Estimated LOC (all <200 lines)

1. LEVEL_SWEEP_SNIPE: ~120 LOC (level lookup + volume threshold + single-bar logic)
2. TRENDLINE_BREAK_VOLUME: ~150 LOC (trendline detection + volume check + break logic)
3. RIBBON_SPREAD_WATCHER: ~40 LOC (EMA computation already exists, add spread check)
4. VOLUME_DIVERGENCE: ~60 LOC (volume rolling avg + divergence check)
5. STAIRSTEP_CONTINUATION: ~140 LOC (bounce_history tracking + monotonic check)
